MATCH (s:Station {name: 'Central Station'}) RETURN s
MATCH (t:Train) WHERE t.status = 'InService' RETURN t.id, t.type, t.capacity
MATCH (s:Station {name: 'North End'})-[:HAS_PLATFORM]->(p:Platform) RETURN count(p) AS platform_count
MATCH (s:Station) WHERE s.zone = 1 RETURN s.name ORDER BY s.name ASC
MATCH (p:Passenger {id: 'P12345'})-[:PURCHASED]->(t:Ticket) RETURN t ORDER BY t.purchase_date DESC LIMIT 5
MATCH (t:Train {id: 'T-202'})-[:ASSIGNED_TO]->(r:Route) RETURN r.name, r.schedule_type
MATCH (i:Incident {status: 'Open'})-[:AFFECTED]->(r:Route) RETURN i.description, r.name
MATCH (t:Train {id: 'T-404'}) SET t.status = 'Maintenance', t.last_maintenance_date = date()
MATCH (p:Passenger {id: 'P99'}) SET p.membership_status = 'Gold' RETURN p
MATCH (t:Ticket {id: 'TK-5532'}) DELETE t
MATCH (s:TicketSalesSummary) WHERE date(s.date).year = 2023 RETURN sum(s.total_revenue) AS annual_revenue
MATCH (d:Depot)<-[:HOUSED_AT]-(t:Train) RETURN d.name, count(t) AS train_count ORDER BY train_count DESC
MATCH (p:Passenger)-[:PURCHASED]->(t:Ticket)-[:VALID_FOR]->(j:Journey) WHERE j.departure_time > datetime() RETURN p.name, count(t) AS upcoming_trips
MATCH (r:Route)-[:INCLUDES]->(start:Station {name: 'Station A'}), (r)-[:INCLUDES]->(end:Station {name: 'Station B'}) RETURN DISTINCT r.name AS shared_routes
MATCH (j:Journey)-[:OPERATED_BY]->(t:Train) WHERE j.delay_minutes > 0 RETURN t.id, avg(j.delay_minutes) AS avg_delay ORDER BY avg_delay DESC LIMIT 3
MATCH (s:Station)<-[:OCCURRED_AT]-(i:Incident) WITH s, count(i) AS incident_count WHERE incident_count > 2 RETURN s.name, incident_count
MATCH (p:Passenger)-[:OWNS]->(tc:TravelCard) MATCH (p)-[:PURCHASED]->(t:Ticket) WHERE t.purchase_date > tc.expiry_date RETURN DISTINCT p.name, p.email
MATCH (s:StaffMember)-[:ASSIGNED_TO]->(st:Station) MATCH (s)-[:LOGGED_MAINTENANCE]->(m:MaintenanceLog)-[:FOR_TRAIN]->(t:Train) RETURN s.name, st.name, count(m) AS logs_submitted
MATCH (i:Incident)-[:AFFECTED]->(r:Route)<-[:USES_ROUTE]-(j:Journey)-[:OPERATED_BY]->(t:Train) SET t.status = 'Delayed' RETURN t.id, i.type, count(j) AS affected_journeys

MATCH (p:Passenger)-[:PURCHASED]->(t:Ticket) WITH p, sum(t.price) AS total_spend OPTIONAL MATCH (p)-[:OWNS]->(tc:TravelCard) WITH p, total_spend, tc WHERE total_spend > 200 OR tc.discount_rate > 0.5 RETURN p.name, total_spend, tc.discount_rate ORDER BY total_spend DESC
MATCH (s:Station) WHERE s.facilities CONTAINS 'WiFi' RETURN s.name, s.zone
MATCH (d:DailyPassengerLog) WHERE date(d.log_date) = date() RETURN d.total_entries, d.total_exits
MATCH (s:Station {name: 'Westside'})-[:HAS_PLATFORM]->(p:Platform) WHERE p.accessible = true RETURN p.platform_number
MATCH (r:Route) RETURN r.name, COUNT {(r)-[:INCLUDES]->(:Station)} AS station_count ORDER BY station_count DESC LIMIT 5
MATCH (t:Train) WHERE t.status = 'Available' RETURN t.id, t.type, t.location
MATCH (t:Ticket {status: 'Valid'})-[:VALID_FOR]->(j:Journey) WHERE j.departure_time < datetime() SET t.status = 'Expired' RETURN count(t)
MATCH (i:Incident) WHERE i.timestamp > datetime() - duration('P7D') RETURN i.type, count(i) AS occurrence_count ORDER BY occurrence_count DESC
MATCH (s:Station {name: 'Old Town Junction'}) SET s.name = 'Heritage Junction', s.last_renamed = date()
MATCH (p:Passenger {email: 'john.doe@example.com'}) DETACH DELETE p
MATCH (t:Train)-[:STOPS_AT]->(s:Station {name: 'Central Station'}) RETURN DISTINCT t.id, t.type
MATCH (r:Route)-[:INCLUDES]->(start:Station {name: 'Station A'}), (r)-[:INCLUDES]->(end:Station {name: 'Station B'}) RETURN r.name, r.line_color
MATCH (s:StaffMember)-[:ASSIGNED_TO]->(d:Depot) RETURN d.name, collect(s.name) AS staff_list
MATCH (tc:TravelCard) WHERE tc.expiry_date < date() SET tc.status = 'Expired' RETURN tc.id
MATCH (p:Passenger)-[:PURCHASED]->(t:Ticket) WITH p, sum(t.price) AS total_spent RETURN p.name, total_spent ORDER BY total_spent DESC LIMIT 3
MATCH (s:Station) WHERE NOT (s)<-[:STOPS_AT]-(:Train) RETURN s.name AS inactive_stations
MATCH (m:MaintenanceLog)-[:PERFORMED_ON]->(t:Train {id: 'T-500'}) RETURN m.log_date, m.description, m.cost ORDER BY m.log_date DESC LIMIT 1
MATCH (j:Journey)-[:OPERATED_BY]->(t:Train)-[:HOUSED_AT]->(d:Depot {city: 'Metro City'}) RETURN j.journey_id, j.departure_time
MATCH path = shortestPath((start:Station {name: 'North End'})-[:CONNECTS_TO*]-(end:Station {name: 'South Terminal'})) RETURN path
MATCH (t:Ticket {id: 'TK-998877'}) REMOVE t.promo_code RETURN t
MATCH (p:Passenger)-[:OWNS]->(tc:TravelCard) WHERE tc.discount_rate > 0.5 MATCH (p)-[:PURCHASED]->(t:Ticket) RETURN p.name, count(t) AS discounted_purchases
MATCH (i:Incident {severity: 'High'})-[:AFFECTED]->(r:Route)<-[:USES_ROUTE]-(j:Journey) SET j.status = 'Disrupted' RETURN j.id, r.name

MATCH (s:TicketSalesSummary) WITH sum(s.total_revenue) AS total_rev, sum(s.tickets_sold) AS total_tix RETURN total_rev, total_tix, CASE WHEN total_tix = 0 THEN null ELSE total_rev / total_tix END AS avg_price
MATCH (d:Depot)-[:HOUSES]->(t:Train) WITH d, count(t) AS trains_housed WHERE d.capacity >= trains_housed RETURN d.name, d.capacity, trains_housed
MATCH (r:Route) WHERE r.type = 'Express' SET r.priority_level = 1 RETURN r.name
MATCH (p:Passenger)-[:PURCHASED]->(t:Ticket)-[:VALID_FOR]->(j:Journey) WHERE j.departure_time > datetime() RETURN p.name, j.departure_time ORDER BY j.departure_time ASC LIMIT 10
MATCH (t:Train) WHERE date(t.last_maintenance_date) < date() - duration('P180D') SET t.status = 'MaintenanceRequired' RETURN t.id
MATCH (s:Station {name: 'Closed Station'}) WITH s DELETE s
MATCH (t:Ticket) WHERE t.status = 'Refunded' DELETE t
MATCH (p:Passenger)-[:PURCHASED]->(t:Ticket) WITH p, count(t) AS ticket_count WHERE ticket_count > 15 SET p.tier = 'Platinum' RETURN p.name
MATCH (i:Incident) RETURN i.location, collect(DISTINCT i.type) AS incident_types_found
MATCH (s:Station) RETURN s.zone, count(s) AS stations_in_zone ORDER BY stations_in_zone DESC
MATCH (r:Route)-[:INCLUDES]->(s:Station) WITH r, collect(s.name) AS stops RETURN r.name, stops
MATCH (p:Passenger {id: 'P-101'})-[:PURCHASED]->(t:Ticket) WITH p, t ORDER BY t.purchase_date DESC WITH p, head(collect(t)) AS last_ticket RETURN p.name, last_ticket.id
MATCH (j:Journey)-[:DEPARTS_FROM]->(s:Station)-[:HAS_PLATFORM]->(p:Platform {platform_number: 1}) RETURN j.journey_id, s.name
MATCH (t:Train)-[:STOPS_AT]->(s:Station) WITH t, count(DISTINCT s) AS stops_count SET t.total_stops = stops_count RETURN t.id, t.total_stops
MATCH (p:Passenger)-[:PURCHASED]->(t:Ticket)-[:VALID_FOR]->(j:Journey)-[:OPERATED_BY]->(tr:Train {type: 'HighSpeed'}) RETURN DISTINCT p.name, p.email
MATCH (r:Route) WHERE (r)-[:INCLUDES]->(:Station {name: 'Junction X'}) AND (r)-[:INCLUDES]->(:Station {name: 'Junction Y'}) RETURN r.name AS connecting_routes
MATCH (s:Station)<-[:DEPARTS_FROM]-(j:Journey) WITH s, count(j) AS departures ORDER BY departures DESC LIMIT 1 RETURN s.name, departures
MATCH (tss:TicketSalesSummary) WHERE tss.date = date() SET tss.last_updated = datetime()
MATCH (p:Passenger)-[:OWNS]->(tc:TravelCard)-[:VALID_FOR]->(r:Route) RETURN p.name, collect(DISTINCT r.name) AS valid_routes
MATCH (t:Train) WHERE t.capacity >= 500 AND t.capacity <= 1000 RETURN t.id, t.type, t.capacity
MATCH (j:Journey)-[:DEPARTS_FROM]->(s:Station {name: 'Central Station'}) WHERE date(j.departure_time) = date() RETURN count(j) AS journeys_today
MATCH (i:Incident {id: 'INC-5520'}) SET i.status = 'Resolved', i.resolved_timestamp = datetime() RETURN i
MATCH (r:Route)-[:INCLUDES]->(s:Station) WITH r, count(s) AS station_count WHERE station_count > 5 RETURN r.name, station_count
MATCH (m:MaintenanceLog {id: 'ML-100'}) DELETE m
MATCH (p:Passenger)-[:PURCHASED]->(t:Ticket)-[:VALID_FOR]->(j:Journey)-[:USES_ROUTE]->(r:Route {name: 'Red Line'}) WHERE NOT (p)-[:OWNS]->(:TravelCard) RETURN DISTINCT p.name
MATCH (j:Journey)-[:DEPARTS_FROM]->(s:Station {name: 'West End'}) WHERE j.delay_minutes IS NOT NULL RETURN avg(j.delay_minutes) AS average_delay
MATCH (s:StaffMember) WHERE NOT (s)-[:LOGGED_MAINTENANCE]->(:MaintenanceLog) RETURN s.name, s.role
MATCH (t:Train {id: 'TR-88'}) SET t.capacity = 650 RETURN t
MATCH (r:Route)<-[:USES_ROUTE]-(j:Journey)<-[:VALID_FOR]-(t:Ticket) RETURN r.name, count(t) AS ticket_sales ORDER BY ticket_sales DESC LIMIT 1
MATCH (p:Passenger)-[:PURCHASED]->(t:Ticket)-[:VALID_FOR]->(j:Journey) WHERE date(j.departure_time) > date() + duration('P7D') RETURN DISTINCT p.email
MATCH (s:Station {name: 'Old Town'})-[:HAS_PLATFORM]->(p:Platform) SET p.is_under_repair = true RETURN p.platform_number
MATCH (d:Depot)<-[:HOUSED_AT]-(t:Train {status: 'Available'}) RETURN d.name, count(t) AS available_trains
MATCH (i:Incident) WHERE i.timestamp.dayOfWeek IN ['Saturday', 'Sunday'] RETURN i.type, i.description
MATCH (t:Ticket {class: 'FirstClass'}) RETURN sum(t.price) AS total_first_class_revenue
MATCH (s:Station) REMOVE s.temporary_closure_note RETURN s.name
MATCH (p:Passenger)-[:PURCHASED]->(t:Ticket)-[:VALID_FOR]->(j:Journey) WHERE date(t.purchase_date) = date(j.departure_time) RETURN p.name, count(t) AS same_day_bookings
MATCH (i:Incident)-[:AFFECTED]->(r:Route) WITH r, count(i) AS incident_count WHERE incident_count > 2 RETURN r.name, incident_count
MATCH (t:Ticket)-[:VALID_FOR]->(j:Journey {id: 'J-909'}) RETURN t.price ORDER BY t.price ASC LIMIT 1
MATCH (m:MaintenanceLog {id: 'ML-202'}) SET m.cost = m.cost * 1.15 RETURN m.id, m.cost
MATCH (r:Route)-[:INCLUDES]->(s1:Station {name: 'Junction A'}), (r)-[:INCLUDES]->(s2:Station {name: 'Junction B'}) RETURN DISTINCT r.name
MATCH (s:StaffMember)-[:ASSIGNED_TO]->(d:Depot) RETURN d.location, collect(s.name) AS staff_roster
MATCH (t:Train) WHERE NOT (t)<-[:FOR_TRAIN]-(:MaintenanceLog) AND t.status = 'Active' RETURN t.id
MATCH (t:Ticket {status: 'Cancelled'}) DELETE t
MATCH (r:Route) RETURN r.name, r.total_distance_km ORDER BY r.total_distance_km DESC LIMIT 1

MATCH (p:Passenger)-[:PURCHASED]->(:Ticket)-[:VALID_FOR]->(j:Journey)-[:DEPARTS_FROM]->(s:Station) WITH p, count(DISTINCT s) AS stations_visited WHERE stations_visited >= 10 RETURN p.name, stations_visited
MATCH (p:Passenger {id: 'P-999'})-[:PURCHASED]->(t:Ticket) SET t.status = 'Refunded' RETURN t.id

MATCH (t:Train {id: 'T-101'})<-[:OPERATED_BY]-(j:Journey) WHERE date(j.departure_time) = date() WITH min(j.departure_time) AS start, max(j.departure_time) AS end RETURN duration.inSeconds(start, end).hours AS operational_hours
MATCH (i:Incident {severity: 'Critical'})-[:AFFECTED]->(r:Route)<-[:USES_ROUTE]-(j:Journey) SET j.status = 'Cancelled' RETURN j.id, r.name
MATCH (p:Passenger)-[:PURCHASED]->(:Ticket)-[:VALID_FOR]->(j:Journey)-[:USES_ROUTE]->(r:Route) WITH p, count(DISTINCT r) AS routes_used ORDER BY routes_used DESC LIMIT 3 RETURN p.name, routes_used
MATCH (p:Passenger)-[:PURCHASED]->(t:Ticket) WITH p, sum(t.price) AS total_spend WHERE total_spend > 500 SET p.tier = 'Platinum' RETURN p.name
MATCH path = shortestPath((start:Station {name: 'North Station'})-[:CONNECTS_TO*]-(end:Station {name: 'South Station'})) RETURN length(path) AS stops_count
MATCH (tc:TravelCard) WHERE NOT (tc)<-[:USED_FOR_PURCHASE]-(:Ticket) RETURN tc.id, tc.expiry_date
MATCH (t:Ticket) WHERE date(t.purchase_date) = date() WITH t.purchase_date.hour AS hour, count(t) AS sales_volume RETURN hour, sales_volume ORDER BY hour
MATCH (t:Train) WHERE t.last_maintenance_date < date() - duration('P365D') SET t.status = 'InspectionRequired' RETURN t.id
MATCH (p:Passenger) WITH p.name AS name, count(p) AS duplicate_count WHERE duplicate_count > 1 RETURN name, duplicate_count
MATCH (s:Station)  RETURN { name: s.name,  zone: s.zone,  platforms: COUNT { (s)-[:HAS_PLATFORM]->() } } AS station_details
MATCH (i:Incident)-[:AFFECTED]->(j:Journey)<-[:VALID_FOR]-(t:Ticket)<-[:PURCHASED]-(p:Passenger) RETURN i.id, count(DISTINCT p) AS passengers_impacted
MATCH (d:DailyPassengerLog {log_date: date()}) SET d.total_entries = 0, d.total_exits = 0 RETURN d

MATCH (p:Passenger)-[:PURCHASED]->(t:Ticket)-[:VALID_FOR]->(j:Journey)-[:OPERATED_BY]->(tr:Train {type: 'HighSpeed'}) WHERE NOT (p)-[:OWNS]->(:TravelCard) RETURN DISTINCT p.name, count(t) AS high_speed_tickets
